# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the pending remediation for Bead 9ni.3.2.2. Runtime bead membership loading now validates the materialized milestone snapshot's source requirements bundle before returning planned/exported bead refs, so CLI and daemon post-completion selection paths cannot claim from a stale materialized plan. Embedded-bundle fallback handoffs now clear the payload bundle id when the authoritative payload is invalid, so materialized legacy fallback plans do not persist a bogus source backlink and remain fresh. Added regressions for stale post-completion selection and embedded-fallback freshness. Verified the deferred precise per-question invalidation follow-up exists as bead ralph-burning-epnn.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"order":1,"status":"completed","description":"Inspected the stale bypasses in runtime bead selection and requirements milestone handoff extraction."},{"order":2,"status":"completed","description":"Moved runtime plan-membership freshness validation
